mapper.sql: id AS log_id, application_id, agent_name, model_name, prompt_summary, response_summary, input_tokens, output_tokens, duration_ms, trace_status, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO llm_trace_log (application_id, agent_name, model_name, prompt_summary, response_summary, input_tokens, output_tokens, duration_ms, trace_status, created_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{agentName}, #{modelName}, #{promptSummary}, #{responseSummary}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{durationMs}, #{traceStatus}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE llm_trace_log SET application_id=#{applicationId}, agent_name=#{agentName}, model_name=#{modelName}, prompt_summary=#{promptSummary}, response_summary=#{responseSummary}, input_tokens=#{inputTokens}, output_tokens=#{outputTokens}, duration_ms=#{durationMs}, trace_status=#{traceStatus} WHERE id=#{logId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM llm_trace_log WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} ORDER BY created_at, id
